'''鈭歱-v-p-zh''' ('''kapavpezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscitate|oscitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscitate|oscitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-v-p-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kapavpezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipavpezhoko|thipavpezhoko]] || [[word:jipavpezhoko|jipavpezhoko]] || [[word:shipavpezhoko|shipavpezhoko]] || [[word:kipavpezhoko|kipavpezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupavpezhoko|thuthupavpezhoko]] || [[word:jujupavpezhoko|jujupavpezhoko]] || [[word:shushupavpezhoko|shushupavpezhoko]] || [[word:kukupavpezhoko|kukupavpezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupavpezhoko|thupavpezhoko]] || [[word:jupavpezhoko|jupavpezhoko]] || [[word:shupavpezhoko|shupavpezhoko]] || [[word:kupavpezhoko|kupavpezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopavpezhoko|thopavpezhoko]] || [[word:jopavpezhoko|jopavpezhoko]] || [[word:shopavpezhoko|shopavpezhoko]] || [[word:kopavpezhoko|kopavpezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pavpezhoko|th忙pavpezhoko]] || [[word:j忙pavpezhoko|j忙pavpezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙pavpezhoko|sh忙pavpezhoko]] || [[word:k忙pavpezhoko|k忙pavpezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
